must_detect.matched_text:
Strategic Investment Term Sheet — Siam Green Grid Public Company Limited (SET: SGGX) and Lanna Digital Infrastructure Co., Ltd.
Transaction: proposed subscription for newly issued shares of Lanna Digital Infrastructure by Siam Green Grid PCL to establish a strategic partnership in data center build-out.
Structure: minority investment; maximum post-closing holding up to [●]% (not exceeding tender offer thresholds under the Securities and Exchange Act B.E. 2535).
Consideration: aggregate consideration THB [●] with price per share THB [●]; placeholders only, for high-level discussion and public-summary alignment.
Regulatory: SEC Thailand and SET processes to be followed; file Form 246-2 if voting rights cross 5%; no mandatory tender offer expected; references to publicly available SET Listing of Shares guidelines (2023 edition).
MAC/MAE: no MAC condition; general market events, SET trading halts, or index volatility shall not constitute a MAE for purposes of closing.
Definitive agreements: Subscription Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement under Thai law using market-standard, publicly referenced forms; ancillary NDA uses anonymised data only.
Timing and disclosure: draft ir note — hold for release on SET news portal at 2026-07-01 08:45 ICT; prior internal circulation only to ir@siamgreengrid.co.th and legal@siamgreengrid.co.th.
